title: Remove email signatures in tracked emails
excerpt: Is there a way to strip out html signatures?  We use exclaimer for very attractive visual signatures in our emails, but they get totally distorted in the Updates section and take up like 10".  Is there a way to put perha…

posts.author: mchinsky (Mark Chinsky)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to strip out html signatures? We use exclaimer for very attractive visual signatures in our emails, but they get totally distorted in the Updates section and take up like 10". Is there a way to put perhaps a hidden or white series of characters at the beginning of our signature so that Monday would know to stop attaching after that?

posts.author: mchinsky (Mark Chinsky)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s interesting is the signatures look alot better when they come through Communihub than when they come from updates. I’m guessing you are using different code for those?

posts.author: sizzleandstir (Stuart)
posts.cookedHtml:
if we can strip out email signatures when using the ‘Write updates via email’ function would be very helpful

I don’t need to see my own large email signature (v.large with data protection paragraph etc) recurringly in monday

In fact don’t need to see anyones email signature. If there is a way to strip these out completely would be a massive imporvement. thanks

posts.author: sstubbs (Sam Stubbs)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for a way to prevent our signatures from appearing in updates when we reply from our mail client. Is there any change on this that anyone is aware of?
